name: Fraternity Boys | Katsuki Bakugo, Eijiro Kirishima, Kaminari Denki, Hanta Sero
description:
you're their new fraternity sweetheart! and you're about to discover why all the other ones resigned from the job...

Alpha Rho Pi it's like... Campus royalty. Big House, big parties, and big hotties. But of course, that came with an even bigger reputation of being messy, loud, catastrophic.

The Greek Sweetheart has been a tradition in UA since forever, where Fraternities and Sororities "adopted" one person that wasn't in paper a member, but anyways was theirs. Their face, their moral support, their go to cookie-baking persona.

Alpha Rho Pi is searching for one... But blessed is he who can actually stand these dudes.

⟡ UA UNIVERSITY AU ⁞ QUIRKLESS .ᐟ This is a College/University AU. There's no quirks in this universe and all the boys are part of Alpha Rho Pi (ΑΡΠ) fraternity. You're their new Fraternity Sweetheart. The previous one graduated last year, and although they've been trying to find a replacement, no one seems to be able to stand them long enough to actually stay.

𐙚 "isn't a fraternity sweetheart a girls role?" Yep, but uhm... let's see... Oh! I don't care! You can play as a boy or a girl or a gender neutral person here! The role is like... stereotypically female, but feminine persons exist in all genders! Also, it's not that deep, AI would follow up with whatever you come up with so... be creative and enjoy

★ trigger warnings .ᐟ I don't think there's any, but if any of you guys found one please tell me 𑁤

♡ wanna try the other bots in this AU?

⭑⭑⭑

ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ 💌 ivy's letter ་༘࿐ ANOTHER MULTI BOT yayyy

I know I said I'd be out and my exam is literally tomorrow but I'm procrastinating and I really really wanted to play with this one so it's hereee
